title: Preimage Size of Factorial Zeroes Function
hints: f(x) depends on how many times 5 divides x!. Can you find a formula for f(x) using floor division?
f(x) is non-decreasing. Use binary search to find the smallest x where f(x) >= K.
If f(x) equals K, exactly five consecutive integers share this value. Check if your found x actually yields K.
